text: Patrizia Pepe | Apparel and Accessories for Women and Men SS26: The Occasionwear Edit Step into the heart of the new season Fluid silhouettes meet structured tailoring, balancing softness and strength in every look. A palette of Summer Cream, Silky Nude and Terracotta defines the mood of the season - fresh, confident and made for special moments.
